name: filesystem
nativeFeature: Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep tools
notes: Claude Code has built-in file operations that are faster and better integrated. The filesystem MCP adds tool definitions for no additional capability.

name: memory
notes: Native MEMORY.md provides per-project memory. If claude-mem plugin is also installed, the generic memory MCP is fully redundant.

name: sequential-thinking
notes: Claude Code has native extended thinking that is faster and more deeply integrated than an MCP-based chain-of-thought wrapper.

name: ralph-loop
nativeFeature: OMC native ralph skill and mode
notes: oh-my-claudecode includes a fully integrated ralph skill that is actively maintained. The standalone ralph-loop plugin is abandoned.

name: vercel
nativeFeature: vercel-plugin with 40+ skills, deployment, auth, storage, observability
notes: The old vercel plugin was MCP-only with read-only operations. vercel-plugin (0.24.0) is vastly more capable with 40+ skills.

name: claude-hud
nativeFeature: OMC HUD skill with statusline integration
notes: oh-my-claudecode includes HUD functionality. claude-hud may still be useful if you prefer its specific display format.

name: fetch
notes: Claude Code has native WebFetch for URL retrieval and WebSearch for web searches. A fetch MCP is redundant.

name: brave-search
notes: Claude Code has native WebSearch. Brave Search MCP adds API key overhead for equivalent functionality.

name: puppeteer
notes: Playwright is the standard browser automation for Claude Code. Puppeteer MCP is redundant if Playwright is installed.
